'''Gaelin''' was a [[Slicer/Legends|slicer]] on [[Pembric II]] during the early [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. An apprentice tech to the [[Keiffler Brothers]], he assisted in their work on the ''[[FarStar]]'' when it was under [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Kentor Sarne]]'s control. Unlike the Brothers, Gaelin returned to Pembric II and began working for himself. Sarne had given him orders to watch over [[Crev Bombaasa/Legends|Crev Bombaasa]]. Without finances and clout, however, he was pulled into the [[Bombaasa Cartel]], since Bombaasa trusted no one who had come into contact with Sarne. Although desperate to leave the planet, Gaelin was locked away in a [[Laboratory/Legends|lab]] with his equipment. Despite this, he managed to send reports to Sarne on Bombaasa until the moff retreated from [[Kal'Shebbol/Legends|Kal'Shebbol]].

In [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]], a landing party from the ''FarStar'', aided by [[Breslin Drake]], liberated Gaelin from his imprisonment, and he joined the crew of the [[CR90 corvette/Legends|corvette]]. He uncovered over twenty-five separate traps in the systems of the ''FarStar'', including the high-powered tracking beacon. However, he wasn't as skilled as his mentors, and missed several of the more subtle traps.
